data_description.battery_size: The battery size you want to simulate
data_description.usable_capacity_pct: Percentage of rated capacity that is actually usable (typically 85–95% when new, lower as the battery ages)
data_description.min_soc_pct: Percentage of rated capacity always kept in reserve to protect battery longevity (check your battery's manual)

user.title: Configure Home Battery Sizer
user.description: Sensors will be auto-detected from your Energy dashboard if configured. Otherwise, select cumulative energy sensors in kWh.

data_description.solar_sensor: Cumulative kWh sensor for solar production (e.g. from your inverter)
data_description.grid_import_sensor: Cumulative kWh sensor for energy imported from the grid
data_description.grid_export_sensor: Cumulative kWh sensor for energy exported to the grid

data_description.usable_capacity_pct: Percentage of rated capacity that is actually usable (typically 85–95% when new, lower as the battery ages)
data_description.min_soc_pct: Percentage of rated capacity always kept in reserve to protect battery longevity (check your battery's manual)
